title: TEMPORARY UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF LAKE OSWEGO TEMPORARY UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Residents may be eligible for one-time emergency assistance for water, sewer, surface water, and street maintenance. Assistance is limited to no more than two months within a rolling 12 month period. 380 A Avenue Lake Oswego, OR 97034 Eligibility: Customer must be residing at a single family dwelling or accessory dwelling unit and the utility bill in their name, must show emergency financial need. Utility address must be within the City of Lake Oswego. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 635-0265 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 635-0265 Water and Sewer Billing Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for application or more information. FEES: None, the maximum amount of assistance per customer is limited to $200 per month. Limit amount is subject to availability DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Lake Oswego, unincorporated Clackamas County served by the City of Lake Oswego SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near TriMet Transit Center Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF LAKE OSWEGO CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF LAKE OSWEGO POLICE DEPARTMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF LAKE OSWEGO
